name: Adrian Laurier
description:
Slacker/Any!POV

I've been sitting in this guy for what feels like forever. I had his idea in my head before I even released Connor, but I've been doubting myself so much that it's been keeping me from releasing anything at all. I'm trying to rewire my brain so I don't do that as much, so here he is!

TW: This one is really important so PLEASE use caution with this bot. SA mentioned in his backstory, imposter syndrome, PTSD, shitty father, traumatic experiences. I don't think I missed any but PLEASE proceed with caution!

NOTES: I have another bot ready to be released, either later today or maybe tomorrow? I'm gonna try to start releasing more often, since I've got so many ideas. But that self doubt is Self-Doubting.

(I'll update my reads next bot, I'm posting this as I go into a store lol)

☆ ST CARD
creator: Bookishdoll
